title: Market Report
text:
TIMESTAMP: 2026-04-22 12:30 PDT
📊 Markets — Wednesday, April 22, 2026

Tech stocks power broader gains as semiconductor strength lifts Nasdaq to strong session high.

📈 US
• S&P 500: $710.53 (+0.92%)
• Nasdaq: $654.24 (+1.54%)
• Dow: $494.1 (+0.56%)

🛢️ Commodities & Crypto
• Gold: $4744.84/oz (+0.54%)
• BTC/USD: $79065.25 (+3.56%)
• LTC/USD: $56.14 (+1.03%)

🎯 Movers
• TSM: Taiwan Semiconductor leads the upside with a 4.76% rally on robust AI chip demand and strong guidance sentiment.
• AMD: AMD surges 6.40% following analyst upgrades and optimism around data-center GPU shipments.
• AAPL: Apple climbs 2.48% ahead of next week's Q2 earnings, driven by iPhone 16 pre-order strength.
• INTC: Intel slips 1.13% as traders position cautiously ahead of Q1 earnings release next week.
• BTCUSD: Bitcoin jumps 3.56% to cross $79K amid renewed institutional inflows and ETF optimism.

📰 Earnings previews dominate the tape: Intel, Meta, and Apple all see increased attention ahead of quarterly releases next week.

⚡ Sentiment is clearly positive, fueled by a powerful semiconductor rally and resurgent crypto prices. Broader indices grind higher with tech leading the charge.

title: Market Report
text:

US equity futures point to a modestly higher open, with the Dow outperforming as UnitedHealth continues to rally.

title: Market Report

US markets traded mixed with tech indices gaining while broad market edged lower on cautious sentiment.

📈 US

🎯 Movers (only >2% moves or major news)

📰 Intel upgraded by BNP Paribas ahead of earnings; Meta faces scrutiny over employee keystroke tracking for AI training.

⚡ Sentiment is cautious with gold selling off sharply while selective tech momentum persists. AMD's breakout signals rotation into higher-beta semis, but broad indices struggle for direction.

⚡ Sentiment: Mixed-to-negative. Broad indices held up reasonably well, but large-cap tech (META, INTC) dragged performance lower. Crypto stayed strong as risk appetite rotated toward digital assets. Key focus shifts to Apple and Meta earnings later this week.

🎯 Movers (only >2% moves or major news)
• INTC: Down 3.61% after Stifel lifted price targets ahead of earnings; volatility expected around report.
• BTCUSD: +2.44% continuing recent crypto strength; LTCUSD similarly +2.29% in tandem move.
• META: Down 1.58% despite Morgan Stanley calling it top tech earnings pick; investors eye Thursday's report.
• NVDA: Down 1.17% ahead of earnings season; semiconductor momentum in focus.

📰 Key stories

- Intel, AMD, Lattice all saw price target boosts at Stifel; earnings this week likely catalyst-heavy.
- Meta flagged as top tech pick by MS ahead of Thursday, but stock under pressure pre-earnings.

⚡ Sentiment is cautious in pre-downtick with tech earnings as next major catalyst; watch AMD (Tuesday) and META (Thursday) plus broad semiconductors after INTC's move.

title: Market Report
text:
TIMESTAMP: 2026-04-19 14:13 PDT

📊 Markets — Sunday, April 19th, 2026

US equity ETFs rally broadly in final pre-close trading, with tech and growth leading gains ahead of a packed earnings week.

📈 US
• S&P 500 (SPY): $710.14 (+1.21%)
• Nasdaq (QQQ): $648.85 (+1.31%)
• Dow (DIA): $494.22 (+1.77%)

🛢️ Commodities & Crypto
• Gold: $4834.07/oz (flat)
• BTC/USD: $74650.11 (-1.43%)
• LTC/USD: $54.57 (-1.94%)

🎯 Movers (only >2% moves or major news)
• AAPL: +2.59% to $270.23 — strongest performer among primary tickers, leads tech sector gains
• META: +1.73% to $688.55 — in focus ahead of Q1 2026 earnings announcement this week; Morgan Stanley maintains as top tech pick
• TSM: +1.97% to $370.50 — Q1 earnings beat cited; story noted as "still a great buy" amid continued AI/wafer demand

📰 Top headlines
• Investors brace for renewed volatility following weekend Iran developments
• S&P 500 blasts past 7,000 in comeback rally; commentary suggests further upside potential

⚡ Sentiment: Positive. A broad, tech-led advance sets an optimistic tone heading into the week, though crypto diverges to the downside and geopolitical headlines introduce caution.

title: Market Morning
text:
TIMESTAMP: 2026-04-19 14:06 PDT

📊 Markets — Sunday, April 19, 2026

US futures and tech ETFs rally in pre-weekend trade as investors eye Meta earnings and watch Middle East developments.

📈 US
• S&P 500 (SPY): $710.14 (+1.21% chg $8.48) [H: $712.39 L: $705.76]
• Nasdaq (QQQ): $648.85 (+1.31% chg $8.38) [H: $650 L: $644.07]
• Dow (DIA): $494.22 (+1.77% chg $8.59) [H: $497.04 L: $490.36]

💱 Forex (from CAD)
• CAD/USD: 0.73 | CAD/EUR: 0.622 | CAD/CNY: 4.979

🛢️ Commodities & Crypto
• Gold: $4834.14/oz (+0.00%)
• BTC/USD: $74746.03 (-1.31%)
• LTC/USD: $54.54 (-1.99%)

🎯 Movers (only >2% moves or major news)
• AAPL: Apple up 2.59% to $270.23 in a broad tech rally, reaching session highs of $272.30 as investors position ahead of the upcoming earnings season.
• META: Meta climbs 1.73% to $688.55 on heightened interest ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings announcement, with Morgan Stanley recently naming it a top pick among tech earnings plays.

📰
• Meta to announce first quarter 2026 results next week, with investors focusing on AI spending pressure versus revenue growth trajectory.
• TSMC's Q1 earnings beat has reinforced confidence in semiconductor demand, supporting related stocks including TSM which gained 1.97%.

⚡ Sentiment turns cautiously optimistic as US futures extend Friday's gains, but geopolitical tensions from weekend Iran developments could reintroduce volatility. The week ahead is dominated by tech earnings, with Meta's results serving as a key bellwether for AI-inflected growth expectations.
